## Type of Change

## Checklist

- [ ] Data placed in `data/` with descriptive filename
- [ ] Source observatory and dates cited
- [ ] README catalog table updated (if new object)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under [Unreleased]
- [ ] No PII in data files
